frames.caption: A lush, sunlit grassy mound with a dark burrow entrance at the base of a gnarled tree, surrounded by dense forest foliage.
A sunlit, moss-covered hill with a dark burrow entrance at its base sits beneath a large tree with exposed roots, surrounded by lush greenery and dappled forest light.
A sunlit, moss-covered mound with a dark burrow entrance sits beneath a large tree with exposed roots in a lush, vibrant forest clearing.
A sunlit, moss-covered mound with a dark tunnel entrance sits at the base of a gnarled tree in a lush, animated forest.
A sunlit, moss-covered tree with exposed roots features a dark burrow entrance nestled among rocks and lush green grass in a vibrant forest clearing.
